title: Idena 40435 Party Fun Paddle, Pack of 4, with Plastic Bats in Red and Blue and One Pink Ball, Size Approx. 12.5 x 5.5 cm
features: 4 mini paddle balls packed as a set, small and handy, the red and blue bats are printed with white stars, the small pink ball is attached to the paddles by an elastic cord
One, two, three, four, five... with the game paddle is hit against the ball, the ball fasts away and must be hit again with the plastic bat when returning
A fun indoor and outdoor activity for children and adults - the paddle game dispels boredom and promotes dexterity, concentration and motor skills
Ideal for any party bag bag, party bag, win at games and raffles, gift, small reward for special achievements and give away
Made from harmless plastic: free from BPA and phthalates and no sharp edges
